title: Ipc Preload Bridge
description: Electron desktop host concern — **Ipc Preload Bridge**. Local mode runs `createKernel` in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Expose a narrow, typed IPC API to the renderer via `contextBridge`.
context: Electron desktop host concern — **Ipc Preload Bridge**. Local mode runs `createKernel` in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Expose a narrow, typed IPC API to the renderer via `contextBridge`.

rules.requirement: preload exposes only whitelisted IPC methods
rules: The preload script MUST NOT enable `nodeIntegration` in the renderer. Exposed methods MUST map 1:1 to `studio-desktop:ipc-handler-registry` channels.

rules.requirement: bridge API is typed for TypeScript consumers
rules: The renderer MUST import types for the bridged surface so port adapters remain type-safe.

scenarios.requirement: preload exposes only whitelisted IPC methods
scenarios.name: contextBridge exposes port surface
